response.justification: Bogdan possesses extensive software development experience and has worked in the investment banking domain, which is a positive. However, the role specifically requires 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform, which is not evident in his resume. His experience is predominantly in web and full-stack technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang), with only a brief, older mention of C/C++ work, making him a poor fit for this C++-centric capital markets position.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (15+ years).
Experience in investment practices (RIDE Capital) relevant to the Capital Markets domain.
Demonstrated proficiency with modern CI/CD practices and developer tooling.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong C++ development experience.
Insufficient evidence of C++ development specifically on the Windows platform.
Primary technical background is in web/full-stack technologies, not C++ desktop/backend.
